apiKeys.title: API Key
apiKeys.description: Manage your API key for OPDS access
apiKeys.noKey: You don't have an API key yet. Generate one to use with OPDS readers.

createdDialog.title: API Key Created
createdDialog.warning: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again!
createdDialog.instructions: Use this key as your password when connecting to OPDS. Your username is your email address.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API Key
revokeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? Any OPDS readers using this key will no longer be able to access your library.
revokeDialog.regenerateDescription: This will revoke your current API key and create a new one. Any OPDS readers using the old key will need to be updated.
